info.description: Azgaar's Fantasy Map Generator output: azgaar.github.io/Fantasy-map-generator

states.name: Neutrals
diplomacy: Wrogse declared a war on its rival Thytemar
Wrogse's vassal Buglila joined the war on attackers side
Wrogse's vassal Ibrugh joined the war on attackers side
Frightened by Wrogse, Kuibieq severed the defense pact with Thytemar
Thytemar's ally Qid joined the war on defenders side
Thytemar's ally Zinerera joined the war on defenders side
Zinerera's vassal Epeakia joined the war on defenders side
Wrogse's ally Wilcairnia avoided entering the war

religions.name: Qash Deities
religions.deity: Dhod, The Grateful Seer of Summer

religions.name: Norbarnanism
religions.deity: Sharag, The Celestial Sage of War

Regiment composition in 1778 WE:
— infantry: 1202
— cavalry: 212
— archers: 1014
— artillery: 35.

notes.name: Frample Volcano
notes.legend: Dormant volcano. Height: 4489m.

notes.name: Hot Springs of Bazir
notes.legend: A geothermal springs with naturally heated water that provide relaxation and medicinal benefits. Average temperature is 37°C.

notes.name: Aymlie Spring of Youth
notes.legend: This legendary water source is whispered about in ancient tales and believed to possess mystical properties. The spring emanates crystal-clear water, shimmering with an otherworldly iridescence that sparkles even in the dimmest light.

notes.name: Khabiragz — copper mining town
notes.legend: Khabiragz is a mining town of 1866 people just nearby the copper mine.

notes.name: Gazir — silver mining town
notes.legend: Gazir is a mining town of 7499 people just nearby the silver mine.

notes.name: Nanulukk — iron mining town
notes.legend: Nanulukk is a mining town of 807 people just nearby the iron mine.

notes.name: Tulfald Bridge
notes.legend: A formidable bridge spans over the Sharazinb Fork near Tulfald.

notes.name: Zaccug Bridge
notes.legend: A stone bridge spans over the Zaccug River near Boggun.

notes.name: The Dark Badger
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious poached beef with dark juice is served here.

notes.name: The Yellow Bear
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious grilled beans with golden brandy is served here.

notes.name: The Light Camel
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious syrupped camel with purple cider is served here.

notes.name: The Pink Falcon
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious poached pigeon with purple tequila is served here.

notes.name: The Far Ibis
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious poached onions with misty kvass is served here.

notes.name: The Fair Inn
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious flame-broiled tomatoes with shiny beer is served here.

notes.name: The White Hound
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious grilled cake with pink sap is served here.

notes.name: The Green Mule
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious dressed escallop with hot tea is served here.

notes.name: The Golden Boar
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious baked potato with orange rom is served here.

notes.name: The Purple Goose
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious flame-broiled bacon with hot gin is served here.

notes.name: The Happy Eagle
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious dressed eagle with orange nectar is served here.

notes.name: Enenathan Lighthouse
notes.legend: A lighthouse to serve as a beacon for ships in the open sea.

notes.name: Channlanian Lighthouse
notes.legend: A lighthouse to serve as a beacon for ships in the open sea.

notes.name: Kuilan Lighthouse
notes.legend: A lighthouse to serve as a beacon for ships in the open sea.

notes.name: Driz-Mog Waterfall
notes.legend: An impressive waterfall has cut through the land.

notes.name: Luihaugaust Battlefield
notes.legend:
A historical battle of the Inlulilese Invasion. 
Date: June 11, 1773 Witford Era.

notes.name: Gamunzdus Battlefield
notes.legend:
A historical battle of the Khathiz War. 
Date: May 26, 1623 Witford Era.

notes.name: Sigbert Battlefield
notes.legend:
A historical battle of the Epeakian Invasion. 
Date: April 18, 1652 Witford Era.

notes.name: Smallver Battlefield
notes.legend:
A historical battle of the Khathiz Conflict. 
Date: December 9, 1772 Witford Era.

notes.name: Dungeon
notes.legend: Undiscovered dungeon. See One page dungeon

notes.name: Dungeon
notes.legend: Undiscovered dungeon. See One page dungeon

notes.name: Dungeon
notes.legend: Undiscovered dungeon. See One page dungeon

notes.name: Dier Monster
notes.legend: Whispers say a relic monster of 7 m long inhabits Dier Lake. Truth or lie, folks are afraid to fish in the lake.

notes.name: Kington Monster
notes.legend: Old sailors tell stories of a gigantic sea monster inhabiting these dangerous waters. Rumors say it can be 18 m long.

notes.name: Swabing Monster
notes.legend: Old sailors tell stories of a gigantic sea monster inhabiting these dangerous waters. Rumors say it can be 27 m long.

notes.name: Dustfall Giant
notes.legend: Inscriptions speak of a hungry Giant who inhabits Dustfall hills and doesn't mind human flesh.

notes.name: Siredale Forest
notes.legend: A forest sacred to local Dail (Human) Beliefs.

notes.name: Oreilaurthei Forest
notes.legend: A forest sacred to local Farithmism.

notes.name: Liacaveezi Pinery
notes.legend: A pinery sacred to local Arago (Arachnid) Beliefs.

notes.name: Zigsee Jackals
notes.legend: A gang of forest brigands.

notes.name: Vozuled Leopards
notes.legend: A gang of mounted brigands.

notes.name: Stoneywale Jaguars
notes.legend: A gang of forest brigands.

notes.name: Pirates
notes.legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

notes.name: Pirates
notes.legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

notes.name: Pirates
notes.legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

notes.name: Ulgard Obelisk
notes.legend:
An ancient obelisk. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ᡐᡠᢋᡕᠻᠵᠽᢤᡏᠮᢜᢦᡴᢤᠡᡡᠩᠡᢑᠯᡓᢦᠭᢓᢞᢁᠲᡙᠵᡞᢥᡔᠨᡠ᠐ᢀᡓᢤᠿᢛᠦᡍᡰᢥᡗᢜᠻᠦᡒᡎᠾᠲᡟᡟᠩᢀᡙ᠀ᡝᠲᠿᢁᡲᡁᠠᠳᡜᢢᠲᢟᡍᡲᢥᢞᡜᢢᠦᢓᡠᠩᢟᠧᡠᠮᡜᡔᡰᡐᡀ᠀ᢟᠽᢑᢞᡮᢋᢞᡁ

notes.name: Srokzund Column
notes.legend:
An ancient column. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
༮༾༺༻༹༫༩༶༅༣༜༬༃༴༷༭༽༫༪༘༛༥༻༴༒༶༷༚༄༸༆༫༯༻༶༾༖༕༭༵༣༖༡༨༮༰༧༚༪༐༕༊༩༫༦༼༢༮༼༿༠ༀ༳༵༶༜༡༿

notes.name: Qranchod Runestone
notes.legend:
An ancient runestone. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ሀ ረመዐ ፈ ጰፀፀየሀ ዘሐሐረወለ ቀሐፐደፈዘቀወ ተፐወየሐመኀረሰመ ከፐፀኀከጠከወደ ኀሀተሐበገዘ ፀ ፀከበሰደበለገተፀለ

notes.name: Ruined Stronghold
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient stronghold. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Ruined Fortification
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient fortification. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Ruined Mausoleum
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient mausoleum. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Ruined Outpost
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient outpost. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Retharion Archive
notes.legend: A vast collection of knowledge, including many rare and ancient tomes.

notes.name: Travelling Magical Circus
notes.legend: Roll up, roll up, this magical circus is here for a limited time only.

notes.name: Travelling Breathtaking Circus
notes.legend: Roll up, roll up, this breathtaking circus is here for a limited time only.

notes.name: Chaz Tournament
notes.legend: Warriors from around the land gather for a tournament of acumen in Chaz, with fame, fortune and favour on offer to the victor.

notes.name: Sgandrol Fair
notes.legend: A fair is being held in Sgandrol, with all manner of local and foreign goods and services on offer.

notes.name: Minor Jetty
notes.legend: A small location along the Zalbruz River to launch boats from sits here, along with a weary looking owner, willing to sell passage along the river.

notes.name: Rats migration
notes.legend: A huge group of rats are migrating, whether part of their annual routine, or something more extraordinary.

notes.name: Muccukh ball
notes.legend: A ball has been organised at Muccukh as a chance to gather the foreign dignitaries of the area together to be merry, make alliances and scheme around the crisis.

notes.name: Mugga Chasm
notes.legend: The Mugga Chasm. Locals claim that it is a good spot to hid treasure.

notes.name: Syuegheimysa Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Froth Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Goldbreach Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Ghaggul Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Klauthimorneh Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Kobakeki Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Sheoress Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Iorara Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Bakero Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Alaghliminsset Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major city. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Cosmic Rift
notes.legend: A rumoured cosmic rift in this area is causing swarms of foes to spill forth.

notes.name: Disturbed Burial
notes.legend: A burial site has been disturbed in this area, causing the dead to rise and attack the living.

notes.name: Disturbed Burial
notes.legend: A burial site has been disturbed in this area, causing the dead to rise and attack the living.

notes.name: Peryndrithlin Necropolis
notes.legend: A towering necropolis adorned with macabre sculptures and guarded by formidable undead sentinels. Its ancient halls house the remains of fallen heroes, entombed alongside their cherished relics.
